businessSummary.oneLiner: Leading AI data analytics platform for government and enterprise, with Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), and AIP (AI Platform)
businessSummary.description: Palantir builds AI data analytics platforms for government and enterprise clients. FY2025 revenue $4.48B (+60%). US commercial revenue surpassed $650M (Q4 +137% YoY). Pentagon designated Maven AI as an official program of record for military-wide deployment. Selected as software developer for the $185B Golden Dome missile defense project. FY2026 guidance of $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%) signals accelerating growth.
howTheyMakeMoney: Enterprise AI platform (Foundry) - Large enterprise data integration
AIP (AI Platform) - Generative AI integration platform
AIP Boot Camps - Rapid adoption programs driving customer conversion

keyMetrics.name: Trailing P/E
keyMetrics.interpretation: 6.9x the S&P 500 IT sector avg of 34x. 10x the S&P 500 avg of 23x. Extreme premium, though moderating with price decline

keyMetrics.name: Forward P/E (FY2026E)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Based on FY2026E EPS of $1.32. Down from 116x as price drops

keyMetrics.name: Revenue Growth (FY2026E)
keyMetrics.interpretation: From FY2025 $4.48B to FY2026E $7.40B. Growth accelerating

keyMetrics.name: P/S (Price-to-Sales)
keyMetrics.interpretation: 5-8x the software sector avg of 10-15x. PEG 2.43 still signals overvaluation relative to growth

keyMetrics.name: Market Cap
keyMetrics.interpretation: Golden Dome rally fully reversed plus additional decline. Down 29% from $207 high

keyMetrics.name: Seeking Alpha 'Narrative Collapse'
keyMetrics.interpretation: Seeking Alpha: 'Palantir's old narrative is falling apart.' Valuation debate intensifying

growthDrivers.title: Golden Dome $185B missile defense software selection (3/25)
growthDrivers.description: Reuters reported Palantir and Anduril selected to co-develop software for Trump's $185B Golden Dome missile defense system. Stock surged 6.8% then gave it all back in two days

growthDrivers.title: Czech National Bank buys PLTR (3/26)
growthDrivers.description: Czech National Bank purchased 24,730 shares. Central bank buying an AI defense stock is a powerful institutional confidence signal

growthDrivers.title: Bain & Company global partnership expansion (3/26)
growthDrivers.description: Expanded partnership with Bain to accelerate global AIP and Foundry adoption. Consulting channel accelerates enterprise market penetration

growthDrivers.title: Polymarket fraud detection partnership (3/26)
growthDrivers.description: Co-developing Vergence AI-based sports betting fraud detection with Polymarket and TWG AI. Entering the $244B fraud prevention market

growthDrivers.title: Maven AI official Program of Record for entire US military (3/20)
growthDrivers.description: Pentagon designated Maven Smart System as official program of record. Long-term deployment across all military branches confirmed

growthDrivers.title: FY2026 revenue guidance $7.19B-$7.41B (+60-65%)
growthDrivers.description: Management confident in growth acceleration. US commercial segment as key growth engine

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ years of government defense AI track record with top security clearances, Maven military-wide adoption, Iran war combat-proven. A moat money cannot buy

moats.description: Ontology platform deeply integrated into government/military systems. Replacement costs are prohibitively high
Top-level security clearances and 20+ year government trust relationships. Virtually impossible for new entrants to replicate
AIP Boot Camps drive rapid customer acquisition. Ontology data model ecosystem expanding
Used in real-time for thousands of strikes in the Iran conflict. Combat data is a competitive advantage

competitors.name: Anduril Industries
competitors.detail: Defense AI/drone startup. Collaborative relationship with Palantir on Golden Dome. $60B valuation

competitors.name: Snowflake / Databricks
competitors.detail: Enterprise data platform competitors. But far behind Palantir in government/defense access

competitors.name: Microsoft / AWS
competitors.detail: Cloud giants entering government AI. Scale advantage but lack Palantir's specialized Ontology depth

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI platform. Trails Palantir significantly in revenue scale and growth rate

recentNews.headline: PLTR drops 4.78% to $147.56, falls further below 200-day SMA ($164)
recentNews.significance: Iran peace rejection drives Nasdaq -1.14%. Golden Dome rally (+6.8%) fully reversed in two days with additional decline. Trading below 200-day SMA ($163.97)

recentNews.headline: Seeking Alpha: 'Palantir's Old Narrative Is Falling Apart'
recentNews.significance: Sell-rated article citing overvaluation, competition, and defense dependence. Narrative shift debate intensifying

recentNews.headline: Czech National Bank buys 24,730 shares
recentNews.significance: Central bank buying an AI defense stock signals strong institutional confidence

recentNews.headline: Bain partnership expansion, Polymarket fraud detection collaboration
recentNews.significance: Bain expands global AIP/Foundry adoption partnership. Polymarket enters $244B fraud prevention market

recentNews.headline: Golden Dome $185B missile defense software selection, stock surges 6.8%
recentNews.significance: Selected as software developer for Trump administration's $185B space-based missile defense system

analystOpinions.notableComment: Simply Wall St consensus $186.60. Deeply divided: 17 Buy, 14 Hold, 5 Sell. Valuation debate is the core issue. Seeking Alpha argues 'narrative collapse'

risks.title: Extreme Valuation + 'Narrative Collapse' Debate
risks.description: P/E 234x, P/S 78.9x, PEG 2.43. Seeking Alpha claims 'old narrative falling apart.' 5 analyst Sell ratings. Growth premium justification debate intensifying

risks.title: Below 200-Day SMA, Technical Weakness
risks.description: Trading below 200-day SMA ($163.97). Golden Dome +6.8% fully reversed in two days. Selling momentum stronger than buying

risks.title: Geopolitical Double-Edged Risk
risks.description: Iran war escalation is positive for defense revenue but broad risk-off sentiment hurts high-multiple tech stocks more

risks.title: Analyst Opinion Division Deepening
risks.description: 17 Buy, 14 Hold, 5 Sell plus Seeking Alpha Sell article. Market skepticism on high valuation growing

risks.title: Stock-Based Compensation Dilution
risks.description: Share count increased 4.67% in one year. Ongoing SBC dilutes existing shareholder value

buyReasons.title: Irreplaceable defense AI position strengthening
buyReasons.rationale: Golden Dome $185B + Maven program of record + Iran combat-proven. Czech central bank buying. An unassailable defense AI moat

buyReasons.title: Explosive commercial growth + partner expansion
buyReasons.rationale: US commercial Q4 +137%. Bain partnership accelerates global AIP adoption. FY2026 +65% guidance

buyReasons.title: 29% discount from highs, mid-range of 52-week
buyReasons.rationale: Down 29% from $207 high. Fundamentals strengthened by Golden Dome and Maven while price dropped

buyReasons.title: ROE 25.98%, fortress balance sheet
buyReasons.rationale: Debt/equity 0.03, $7.18B cash, $2.1B FCF. Rock-solid financials with high profitability

overallOpinion: Golden Dome rally (+6.8%) was fully erased in two days with an additional -4.78% drop to $147.56. Seeking Alpha's 'old narrative falling apart' article poured fuel on the valuation debate
Fundamentals keep getting stronger: Golden Dome $185B, Maven program of record, Czech central bank buying, Bain partnership. FY2026 +65% guidance confirms the defense AI growth trajectory
The biggest burden remains valuation: P/E 234x, P/S 79x, PEG 2.43. Analysts split 17 Buy, 14 Hold, 5 Sell. Now below the 200-day SMA ($164), adding technical weakness
If it breaks below the 50-day ($150), $126 support opens up. Target $187 (+27%). Growth direction is clear but valuation is the constraint. Small DCA positions only

investmentVerdict.summary: Defense AI moat deepened with Golden Dome and Maven, but P/E 234x below the 200-day SMA with 'narrative collapse' debate makes aggressive buying risky. Growth is certain but overpriced. Small DCA possible, but watching is safer

Golden Dome's +6.8% rally fully reversed in two days. Seeking Alpha published 'Old Narrative Is Falling Apart' as a Sell thesis.

Fundamentals are stronger than ever: Golden Dome $185B, Maven program of record, Czech central bank buying, Bain partnership expansion.

But P/E 234x, P/S 79x, below 200-day SMA. 17 Buy, 14 Hold, 5 Sell.

Target $187 (+27%). Growth is certain but overpriced. Hold.

witty.hook: Selected for Golden Dome on Monday, gave it all back by Wednesday
witty.text:
$PLTR $147.56(-4.78%)

Mon: '$185B missile defense! +6.8%!'
Wed: 'Iran war! -4.78%!'

A company that builds missile defense software, selling off on war fears. Market logic at its finest.

1/4
thread:
SA says 'narrative collapse.'
P/E 234x is a dream, not reality.

But when the dream includes Golden Dome, Maven, and central banks buying in?

2/4

17 Buy, 14 Hold, 5 Sell.
Analysts can't agree either. Half say 'future,' half say 'overpriced.'

Both are right. That's the paradox.

3/4

-29% from highs. 200-day broken.
Missile defense stock that drops on war news.

Hold. Small bets if convicted, watch if not.

4/4

Golden Dome's +6.8% rally fully reversed in two days. Seeking Alpha published 'Old Narrative Is Falling Apart' as a Sell thesis.

Fundamentals are stronger than ever: Golden Dome $185B, Maven program of record, Czech central bank buying, Bain partnership expansion.

witty.hook: Missile defense software maker drops on war news. Only in the stock market.
witty.text:
$PLTR $147.56(-4.78%)

Monday: 'Golden Dome $185B! +6.8%!' Wednesday: 'Iran war! -4.78%!' A company literally building missile shields, dropping because of missiles. The market's irony writes itself.

Seeking Alpha says the narrative is 'falling apart.' P/E 234x is steep, sure. But Golden Dome, Maven, Czech central bank buying aren't narratives, they're contracts.

17 Buy, 14 Hold, 5 Sell. Analysts split 50/50. Both sides have a point.

-29% from highs. Hold. If you believe, small bets. If not, watch.

empathy.hook: PLTR shareholders, Monday's Golden Dome joy vanished in 48 hours
empathy.text:
$PLTR $147.56(-4.78%), down 29% from highs.

Monday's Golden Dome news felt like the turning point. +6.8%! Finally! Then two days later, it's all gone and then some. That hurts.

But Golden Dome, Maven, Czech central bank buying, Bain deal. These are real achievements. The market is panicking broadly, not just at Palantir.

FY2026 +65% growth, commercial +137%. The company is executing. Valuation is the issue, not fundamentals.

Target $187 (+27%). Small positions, patient approach. Long-term view is your friend.
